name: nimi-mods
description: First-party runtime mods for Nimi desktop runtime.

scripts.generate:spec: pnpm run generate:spec:kismet-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:local-chat-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:mint-you-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:test-chat-tts-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:narrative-engine-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:textplay-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:videoplay-kernel-docs && pnpm run generate:spec:world-studio-kernel-docs
scripts.check:spec: pnpm run check:spec:kismet && pnpm run check:spec:local-chat && pnpm run check:spec:mint-you && pnpm run check:spec:test-chat-tts && pnpm run check:spec:narrative-engine && pnpm run check:spec:textplay && pnpm run check:spec:videoplay && pnpm run check:spec:world-studio
scripts.check:spec:kismet: pnpm run check:spec:kismet-kernel-consistency && pnpm run check:spec:kismet-kernel-docs-drift
scripts.check:spec:local-chat: pnpm run check:spec:local-chat-kernel-consistency && pnpm run check:spec:local-chat-kernel-docs-drift
scripts.check:spec:mint-you: pnpm run check:spec:mint-you-kernel-consistency && pnpm run check:spec:mint-you-kernel-docs-drift
scripts.check:spec:textplay: pnpm run check:spec:textplay-kernel-consistency && pnpm run check:spec:textplay-kernel-docs-drift
scripts.check:spec:videoplay: pnpm run check:spec:videoplay-kernel-consistency && pnpm run check:spec:videoplay-kernel-docs-drift
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-kismet run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-local-chat run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-narrative-engine run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-textplay run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-videoplay run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-test-chat-tts run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-audio-book run typecheck && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-world-studio run typecheck
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-kismet run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-local-chat run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-narrative-engine run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-textplay run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-videoplay run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-test-chat-tts run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-audio-book run clean && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/mod-world-studio run clean
scripts.verify: pnpm run check && pnpm run check:spec && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run verify:narrative-engine && pnpm run verify:textplay && pnpm run verify:videoplay && pnpm run build -- --all && pnpm run check:dist
